title: Asterisk Voicemail Storage Growth and MWI NOTIFY Failures
dataSources: `index=voip` `sourcetype=asterisk:full` with `voicemail` subsystem, optional `sourcetype=asterisk:voicemail` custom metrics from `du -sk` scripted input
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder on Asterisk/FreePBX host
spl:
index=voip sourcetype=asterisk:full voicemail OR MWI OR Mailbox
| rex field=_raw "(?i)mailbox\s+(?<mailbox>\S+)"
| bin _time span=1h
| stats count as err_count by _time, host, mailbox
| where err_count > 10
description: Voicemail stores grow with retained compliance recordings; simultaneous MWI NOTIFY failures strand users without blinking lamps. Combining grep-friendly Asterisk logs with optional disk-usage metrics exposes both logical and physical capacity risk.
value: Avoids voicemail outages during revenue-critical periods by alerting on storage pressure and MWI errors before spool partitions fill.
implementation: Forward Asterisk logs; tag voicemail-related lines. Alert when voicemail/MWI error strings exceed 10 per hour per mailbox. Separately schedule `index=os sourcetype=asterisk:voicemail_du` from `du -sk /var/spool/asterisk/voicemail` and alert when `voicemail_kb/1024/1024 > 50` (tune per disk). Integrate with retention jobs documented in runbooks.
visualization: Area chart (voicemail_gb), Table (mailboxes with errors), Single value (spool percent full if added).
knownFalsePositives: MWI or storage noise during mailbox migrations, vmail backup jobs, IMAP bulk deletes, or storage expansion the PBX admin ran during a maintenance window.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Separate partition monitoring if voicemail is on dedicated LVM.
• Legal hold process before auto-purge.

Step 1 — Normalize mailbox field to `extension@context`.

Step 2 — Validate MWI errors by testing NOTIFY with `sip set debug` in lab.

Step 3 — Dashboard for top 20 mailboxes by size.

Step 4 — Automate ticket to PBX admin with disk free %.
grandmaExplanation: We watch voicemail use and MWI health. We help you catch storage or sync issues before messages appear lost.
telcoUseCase: Unified messaging hygiene — prevent `/var/spool/asterisk/voicemail` exhaustion and broken message-waiting lamps on SIP phones.
